Patch Set 2:

The verify build is failing because it is complaining that some image versions
are not released.  Error message is:

09:29:46 robot/values.yaml:25:image: onap/testsuite:1.5.0-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 appc/values.yaml:34:image: onap/appc-image:1.6.0-SNAPSHOT-latest
09:29:46 appc/charts/appc-cdt/values.yaml:29:image: onap/appc-cdt-image:1.6.0-SNAPSHOT-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-be/values.yaml:31:image: onap/sdc-backend:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-be/values.yaml:32:backendInitImage: onap/sdc-backend-init:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-wfd-be/values.yaml:31:image: onap/workflow-backend:1.5.0-SNAPSHOT
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-wfd-be/values.yaml:32:configInitImage: onap/workflow-init:1.5.0-SNAPSHOT
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-fe/values.yaml:31:image: onap/sdc-frontend:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-kb/values.yaml:31:image: onap/sdc-kibana:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-onboarding-be/values.yaml:31:image: onap/sdc-onboard-backend:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-onboarding-be/values.yaml:32:onboardingInitImage: onap/sdc-onboard-cassandra-init:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-cs/values.yaml:31:image: onap/sdc-cassandra:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-cs/values.yaml:32:cassandraInitImage: onap/sdc-cassandra-init:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-es/values.yaml:34:image: onap/sdc-elasticsearch:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-es/values.yaml:35:elasticInitImage: onap/sdc-init-elasticsearch:1.5-STAGING-latest
09:29:46 sdc/charts/sdc-wfd-fe/values.yaml:31:image: onap/workflow-frontend:1.5.0-SNAPSHOT
09:29:46 [ERROR] Only release images are allowed in helm charts.

None of these files is touched by this change.  So, I assume all OOM changes now are blocked until robot, apps and sdc fix their helm charts to use released versions.
